45471892.title: 2002 NACAC Under-25 Championships in Athletics – Results
45471892.extract: These are the full results of the 2002 NACAC Under-25 Championships in Athletics which took place between August 9 and August 11, 2002, at E.M. Stevens Stadium in San Antonio, Texas, United States.
